title: FriendsCraft 3
description: This is a perfected modpack for playing with your friends!
body:
# FriendsCraft 3
Welcome to FriendsCraft 3! This modpack is your essential companion for crafting the perfect multiplayer adventure. This pack is carefully curated to enhance your core Minecraft experience, making it smoother, more social, and visually stunning. The ideal foundation for you and your friends to create unforgettable memories.

It’s all about quality-of-life, better performance, and features that bring you closer together in your shared world. Have fun!

## Core Features
Here is a selection of the most important and interesting mods that elevate the FriendsCraft 3 experience:

### Social & Communication
**Simple Voice Chat** (voicechat): Communicate with your friends directly in the game using realistic positional audio! Makes coordinating and adventuring together incredibly immersive.

**Emotecraft** (emotecraft): Express yourself! Use a wide range of animations to show your friends exactly how you feel.

**Chat Heads** (chat_heads): See a small head of the player who sent a message next to their chat entry, making the conversation feel more personal.

**No Chat Reports** (NoChatReports): Disables the controversial chat reporting system, ensuring private conversations on your server remain private.

**Ping Wheel** (Ping-Wheel): Easily mark locations, mobs, or items in the world for your friends with a simple pinging system, improving coordination during exploration or combat.

### Quality of Life & Utilities
**Xaero's World Map & Minimap** (XaerosWorldMap, Xaeros_Minimap): Adds a self-writing world map and a customizable minimap to easily navigate and mark important locations (Waypoints).

**Litematica** (litematica): A client-side schematic mod that allows for easy, accurate, and creative building projects by projecting a hologram of a structure. Great for planning and building together!

**Mouse Tweaks** (MouseTweaks): Enhances inventory management with useful functions like quick-move and quick-crafting.

**Shulker Box Tooltip** (shulkerboxtooltip): Peek into the contents of a shulker box by hovering over it in your inventory

**Scribble** (Scribble): An expert book-editing mod that adds rich text formatting options (colors, styles) for easier and better-looking books—great for lore or shared notes.

### Aesthetics & Immersion
**Iris Shaders** (iris): Seamlessly integrate Sodium with shaders, allowing you and your friends to enjoy beautiful visual effects.

**Ambient Sounds** (AmbientSounds): Introduces a dynamic sound engine that adds immersive ambient sounds (birds, wind, crickets, cave sounds) based on your environment.

**Sound Physics Remastered** (sound-physics-remastered): Adds realistic sound attenuation, reverb, and occlusion, making the game world sound much more natural.

**LambDynamicLights** (lambdynamiclights): Held or dropped light-emitting items (like torches) will dynamically light up the world around you.

**Presence Footsteps** (PresenceFootsteps): Adds realistic, material-based footstep sounds, making movement more satisfying.

**Better F3** (BetterF3): Cleans up and reorganizes the debug screen (F3) to display only the essential information.

**Immersive UI** (ImmersiveUI): Adds animated UI components, smoother transitions, and animated effects to make the interface more engaging.

**Zoomify** (Zoomify): A highly customizable zoom mod, giving you the ability to easily zoom in on distant objects.

**Heads** (mob-heads, Drop Head, player-drops-head): Mobs and players have a chance to drop their heads, providing fun trophies for your adventures.

**Armor Statues** (ArmorStatues): Fully customize armor stands by unlocking arms, rotating body parts, and choosing from built-in poses.

### Performance & Stability
**Sodium, Lithium, VMP, ImmediatelyFast, Entity Culling, Krypton, etc.**: A massive selection of optimization mods to ensure the modpack runs incredibly well, allowing for higher settings and a more stable server experience.

**Spark** (spark): An essential server-side and client-side profiling tool to help diagnose and fix performance issues quickly.

**Crash Assistant** (CrashAssistant): Provides an immediate GUI after a crash, showing logs and making it easy to report issues.

---

FriendsCraft 3 offers the perfect mix of performance, visual fidelity, and cooperative features, making it the definitive way to play Minecraft with your community!

---
## Important Warning: Usage on Public Servers
We strongly advise against using the FriendsCraft 3 modpack on public, non-whitelisted, or large established multiplayer servers (e.g., Hypixel, GommeHD, etc.).

While the core goal of this modpack is to maintain a mostly vanilla feel, it includes several client-side mods that provide significant advantages and quality-of-life features which are strictly prohibited on most public servers.
**Using this modpack on public servers will likely result in a ban.**
